_comment: Override ledger for the Site Integrity Pipeline.
Add entries here to suppress known false-positive findings.
value      : the entity value (PMID, URL, sequence prefix, PDB ID, etc.)
file_path  : relative file path, or '*' to suppress across all files
"reason": "NCI priority-antigen list paper; legitimately used across all TAA rows as shared meta-reference.",
Matching rule: an override suppresses any finding where check_id AND value match,

overrides.reason: NCI priority-antigen list PMID shared legitimately across all TAA/vaccine KB rows.
